name: IdsDmMbrshDmMbrEligIndExtr

sqlReaderQuery.value: SELECT SRC_SYS_CD, MBR_UNIQ_KEY, MBR_ENR_CLS_PLN_PROD_CAT_CD, MBR_ENR_EFF_DT, MBR_ENR_ELIG_IN, MBR_ENR_TERM_DT, CASE WHEN MBR_ENR_EFF_DT <= '@{pipeline().parameters.CurrDate}' AND MBR_ENR_TERM_DT >= '@{pipeline().parameters.CurrDate}' AND MBR_ENR_ELIG_IN = 'Y' THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS MBR_ENR_ACTV_ROW_IN FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_ClmMartOwner}.MBRSH_DM_MBR_ELIG WHERE (MBR_ENR_EFF_DT <= '@{pipeline().parameters.CurrDate}' AND MBR_ENR_TERM_DT >= '@{pipeline().parameters.CurrDate}' AND MBR_ENR_ELIG_IN = 'Y' AND MBR_ENR_ACTV_ROW_IN = 'N') OR (MBR_ENR_ELIG_IN = 'Y' AND MBR_ENR_TERM_DT < '@{pipeline().parameters.CurrDate}' AND MBR_ENR_ACTV_ROW_IN = 'Y')

Description:
*****************************************************************************************************************************************************************************
COPYRIGHT 2006 BLUE CROSS/BLUE SHIELD OF KANSAS CITY 


JOB NAME:    IdsMbrEligExtr

DESCRIPTION:  
                   IDS Membership Data Mart Member Eligibility extract from IDS to Data Mart.  

INPUTS:
                   IDS:  MBR_PCP
                   IDS:  GRP
                   IDS:  PROD
                   IDS:  CLS
                   IDS:  CLS_PLN
                   IDS:  EXCD

HASH FILES:         
                    hf_mbrsh_dm_grp - cleared in IdsMbrCobExtr
                    hf_mbrsh_dm_excd
                    hf_etrnl_cd_mppng

                    Extracts from IDS and pulls to the Data Marts.  Perform no changes with the data.

TRANSFORMS:  
                    Lookups to extract fields
             
                           
PROCESSING:
                    Extracts from IDS and pulls to the Data Marts.  Perform no changes with the data.

OUTPUTS: 
                    Data Mart:  MBRSH_DM_MBR_ELIG

MODIFICATIONS:
                   Tao Luo:  Original Programming - 02/22/2006
